rows.description: 1798 Recepta varia
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for accurate spelling 'Recepta' after visual verification, overriding gpt-5-mini's 'Receipta'.

rows.description: Nov. 17 Of Mr. Farley, Dr. Shortrudges Benefaction 1st half year of 1798 due Xmas
rows.notes: Amounts (110.0.0) are in consensus. Selected gemini-flash's description 'Shortrudges' and 'Xmas' as visually more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Thorndridge's' and 'mids', despite gpt-5-mini's note on uncertainty. My confidence is high after visual verification.
rows.english_description: Receipt from Mr Farley for Dr. Shortrudge's benefaction, first half-year of 1798, due at Christmas.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from Mr Farley for Dr. Shortrudge's benefaction, first half-year of 1798, amounting to £110 0s 0d.

rows.description: – 22 Of Mr. Rigaud, Mr. Combi, Plate Money
rows.notes: Amounts (10.0.0) are in consensus. Selected gemini-flash for retaining the dash '–' as seen in the image, and for 'Combi' which visually appears more accurate than 'Combs'.
rows.english_description: Plate money paid by Mr Rigaud and Mr Combi.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Plate money paid by Mr Rigaud and Mr Combi, amounting to £10 0s 0d.

rows.description: Dec. 7. Of Mr. Heyes, Mr. Heginbotham’s do

rows.description: – 22 Rent of L. Witteham Rectory to Mich.
rows.notes: Visually verified the amount as £550.0.0, aligning with gpt-5-mini's value. gemini-flash incorrectly read it as £50.0.0. Selected gemini-flash's description (retaining dash '– 22' and 'Witteham' and 'Mich.') as more visually accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Dec. 22' and 'Whitekham' and 'Michl'.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent from Little Wittenham rectory due at Michaelmas, amounting to £550 0s 0d.

rows.description: 1799.4. Of Mr. Cole, Mr. Heywoods Plate Money
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's complete row. gpt-5-mini incorrectly split '1799' into a separate header row and misread the date '4.' as '24'. The image clearly shows '1799.4.' as part of the entry's date. gpt-5-mini's R6 was dropped as an invented row.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Plate money paid by Mr Cole and Mr Heywood, amounting to £10 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts (0.10.8) are in consensus. Selected gemini-flash for the description: '– 18' is accurate, 'Burridge' is clearer than 'Burnidge', and 'Hapur’s Levey' is visually more plausible than 'Napier's lease?', despite gpt-5-mini's note about uncertainty.

rows.description: Mar. 23 – Settled with Mr. Harker, for Merton

rows.english_description: Account settled with Mr Harker on behalf of Merton College.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Account settled with Mr Harker on behalf of Merton College (no amount recorded).
